name: Lentil, artichoke, and red pepper salad
intro: The use of pantry ingredients in this salad, such as French green lentils and artichoke hearts, allows you to build a filling meal in no time. You can try a jar of already-roasted red peppers if you don’t want to roast your own.

ingredients.item: can French green lentils, drained and rinsed
can artichoke hearts, drained and sliced
or 5 red peppers, roasted and sliced
handful of fresh flat-leaf parsley, finely chopped
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Put the lentils, artichoke hearts, red peppers, herbs, and scallions in a large bowl. Drizzle with the oil and vinegar, season with salt and pepper to taste, and toss gently to mix.
Add the prosciutto and arugula to the salad, and toss gently. Divide between 4 plates, and serve.
